expectations.text: Uses events { handler { ... } } for SSE streaming (not event)
expectations.evidence: Line 21: `Method.GET / "search" -> events { handler { ... } }` - correct streaming wrapper

expectations.text: Uses dataOn.input.debounce(300.millis) to debounce input events
Declares Signal[String] and uses dataSignals + dataBind for search input
Includes datastarScript in the HTML head
Uses ServerSentEventGenerator.patchElements with PatchElementOptions.Append for appending results
expectations.evidence: Lines 33-41: Uses `ServerSentEventGenerator.patchElements` with `PatchElementOptions(selector = Some(CssSelector.id("list")), mode = ElementPatchMode.Append)`

expectations.text: Reads search term from request and implements search filter logic
expectations.evidence: Line 23: Reads from `req.url.queryParameters.getAll("q").headOption`; lines 83-106: Product list; line 106: Filter logic with `.filter(_.toLowerCase.contains(term.get.toLowerCase))`

expectations.text: Has sample product list to search against (at least 10 products)
expectations.evidence: Lines 84-102: 45 products across 4 categories (fruits, books, electronics, home & garden) - far exceeds minimum

notes: Perfect implementation of Step 3 (Signal Reading) + Common Patterns (Targeted Patching). Clean two-phase approach: clear container, then append results. Excellent CSS with animations and empty state messaging. 50ms stagger between appends.
